title: Elderberry Lane Quilts • Handmade Baby Quilts, Table Runners & Quilted Gifts from Mint Hill, NC
announcement: Welcome to Elderberry Lane Quilts! I'm Lauren, and I stitch every piece here in my sewing room in Mint Hill, North Carolina, just east of Charlotte. I make baby quilts, table runners, quilted potholders, small lap quilts, and Carolina wren wall hangings. Most of my fabric comes from Stitchworks over in Matthews and my local Joann. I'm a beginner at heart who fell in love with quilting, so please allow 1-2 weeks for made-to-order items. Bless you for stopping by, and message me anytime!
sale_message: Thank you so much for your order, sugar! I'll get started on your quilt within a few days. Every piece is pieced and quilted by hand here in Mint Hill, so little variations in the fabric are part of the charm. Reach out anytime with questions, and God bless!
policy_welcome: Thanks for visiting Elderberry Lane Quilts! Every quilt is made with love and prayer.
policy_payment: I accept payments through Etsy's secure checkout including credit cards, debit cards, Etsy gift cards, and PayPal. For custom baby quilts, a 50% deposit reserves your spot in my queue.
policy_shipping: All items ship via USPS from Mint Hill, NC. Made-to-order quilts ship within 10-14 business days depending on the piecing. Ready-to-ship items go out within 3-5 business days. Larger quilts are folded carefully with tissue and shipped in a protective bag.
policy_refunds: I want you to love your quilt! If it arrives damaged, please send me a photo within 5 days and I'll make it right with a repair, replacement, or refund. Because each piece is handmade, small variations in fabric and stitching are normal and not considered defects.
